title: Glasses
body:
# Introduction

The mod adds several types of glasses.

You can wear them on:
- The Glasses slot - [Curios API(Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) or [Trinkets(Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) is installed;
- The vanilla head slot - no dependency above is installed.

The glasses may have special features:
- Sunglasses can prevent endermen from being provoked when being looked in the eye by a player;
- Some glasses, like the monocular, can work like a spyglass.

You can adjust how you wear a specific type of glasses, via:
- Configuration (.minecraft\config\glasses\xxx.json);
- KeyBindings (Check the controls screen for details).

# Showcase

A player wearing a pair of sunglasses

![Wearing a pair of sunglasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GcrqvTGh/images/41b7301f3c4d951536bda796785dbc56a3861e20.gif)


# ATTENTION

If you want to add more glasses to this mod, feel free to [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/wJUkuWDvNg) or [submit an issue](https://github.com/Nova-Committee/Glasses/issues/new)!

You **DEFINITELY CAN** add the mod to your modpack.
